mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT * FROM quiz_question ORDER BY DBMS_RANDOM.VALUE ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM quiz_log WHERE memberno = #{memberno} AND TRUNC(quiz_date) = TRUNC(SYSDATE)
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO quiz_log (logno, memberno, quiz_date) VALUES (quiz_log_seq.NEXTVAL, #{memberno}, SYSDATE)
